attributes.__structure__:
ATTRS:
  description: Moisture profile data
  VERSION: 0.0.0
  ingress:
    location_file: probes_locations.csv
COORDS:
  date_time:
    name: date_time
    coords:
    - date_time
    unit:
      tick: h
      tz: UTC
      dayfirst: false
      yearfirst: true
    type: datetime64[h]
    na_value: null
    description: Time coordinate
    df_col: date_time
    source_unit:
      tick: h
      tz: UTC
      dayfirst: false
      yearfirst: true
    range: null
    composed:
    - date_time
    chunk_size: 1024
    step_limits:
    - 1
    - 12
    - hour
    sorted: None
  depth_level:
    name: depth_level
    coords:
    - depth_level
    unit: null
    type: null
    description: Depth index form top to bottom.
    df_col: depth_level
    source_unit: null
    range: null
    composed:
    - depth_level
    chunk_size: 1024
    step_limits: any_new
    sorted: true
  site_id:
    name: site_id
    coords:
    - site_id
    unit: null
    type: int32
    na_value: 0
    description: Estimated location ID according to the table of possible locations.
      Including the lab.
    df_col: site_id
    source_unit: null
    range: null
    composed:
    - site_id
    chunk_size: 512
    step_limits: any_new
    sorted: []
  probe_model:
    name: probe_model
    coords:
    - probe_model
    unit: null
    type: null
    df_col: probe_model
    source_unit: null
    range:
      discrete:
      - Odyssey
      - PR2
    composed:
    - probe_model
    chunk_size: 1024
    step_limits: any_new
    sorted: true
VARS:
  T_sensor:
    name: T_sensor
    coords:
    - date_time
    - site_id
    - depth_level
    unit: coulomb * degree
    type: float64
    na_value: .nan
    description: Temperature of sensor
    df_col: T_sensor
    source_unit: coulomb * degree
    range: null
  T_probe:
    name: T_probe
    coords:
    - date_time
    - site_id
    unit: coulomb * degree
    type: float64
    na_value: .nan
    description: Temperature of probe head (Odyssey, PR2 - measured surface temperature)
    df_col: T_probe
    source_unit: coulomb * degree
    range: null
  moisture:
    name: moisture
    coords:
    - date_time
    - site_id
    - depth_level
    unit: dimensionless
    type: float64
    na_value: .nan
    description: 'Moisture reading of the probe. Should be proportional to (absolute)
      volumetric water (usual range: (0, 35))'
    df_col: moisture
    source_unit: dimensionless
    range: null
  permeability:
    name: permeability
    coords:
    - date_time
    - site_id
    - depth_level
    unit: dimensionless
    type: float64
    na_value: .nan
    description: Relative permeability, original physically based reading.
    df_col: permeability
    source_unit: dimensionless
    range: null
  longitude:
    name: longitude
    coords:
    - date_time
    - site_id
    unit: degree
    type: float64
    na_value: .nan
    description: GPS. Signed Earth longitude. Indicated by the probe itself.
    df_col: longitude
    source_unit: degree
    range: null
  latitude:
    name: latitude
    coords:
    - date_time
    - site_id
    unit: degree
    type: float64
    na_value: .nan
    description: GPS. Signed Earth latitude. Indicated by the probe itself.
    df_col: latitude
    source_unit: degree
    range: null
  probe_id:
    name: probe_id
    coords:
    - date_time
    - site_id
    unit: null
    type: str[16]
    na_value: "\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\
      \uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF"
    description: Moisture profile probe ID. U-n for Odyssey. PR-n for PR2 probes.
    df_col: probe_id
    source_unit: null
    range: null
  site_status:
    name: site_status
    coords:
    - date_time
    - site_id
    unit: null
    type: int32
    na_value: 0
    description: 'Integer status code of the site: positive - ok, negative - data
      invalid.'
    df_col: site_status
    source_unit: null
    range: null
  sensor_depth:
    name: sensor_depth
    coords:
    - depth_level
    - probe_model
    unit: meter
    type: float64
    na_value: .nan
    df_col: sensor_depth
    source_unit: meter
    range: null
  manufacture_id:
    name: manufacture_id
    coords:
    - site_id
    unit: null
    type: str[12]
    na_value: "\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF\uFFFF"
    description: Original manufacturer uid.
    df_col: manufacture_id
    source_unit: null
    range: null
